bug_report.summary: FileDialog navigation drifts from build/exports back to project root during export-path selection
steps_to_reproduce: Click the Export Path field’s folder icon to open the chooser.
In the chooser, double-click the project’s “build” folder, then double-click “exports” (or otherwise navigate into build/exports).
expected_behaviors: Chooser path should end in …/build/exports after entering the exports folder.
Directories & Files list should reflect the exports folder contents (possibly empty).
actual_behaviors: Chooser path ends up at the project root (…/new-game-project) instead of …/build/exports.
Directories & Files list shows the ‘build’ folder (indicating the dialog is no longer inside exports).
